name: Turkey Waldorf Sandwich
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the mayonnaise, chopped celery, chopped walnuts, and lemon juice.
2. Lay out two slices of toasted bread.
3. Layer the lettuce, sliced turkey, apple slices, and the mayo mixture evenly on one slice of bread.
4. Place the second slice of bread on top to complete the sandwich.
